text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, refers to computer systems designed to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence. At its core, AI learns from data and improves over time. A key part of AI is machine learning, where computers analyze patterns in data without being explicitly programmed for each task. Deep learning is a more advanced form of machine learning that uses layers of neural networks to process complex information, like recognizing faces or understanding speech. Today, AI is part of daily life—it powers voice assistants like Siri, recommends movies on streaming platforms, helps cars drive themselves, and sorts emails into spam folders.
